blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
